items.title: Hamas Names Khalil al-Hayya as Its New Leader
items.summary: Seen as closer to Iran, Khalil al-Hayya served as the Palestinian militant group’s chief negotiator with Israel and the Trump administration during the Gaza war.

items.title: Notorious drug cartel leader Ismael Zambada sentenced to life in US prison
items.summary: Known as "El Mayo", the co-founder the Sinaloa Cartel was also ordered to pay $15bn after he admitted to sending vast amounts of drugs to the US.
